plant_message: We use MongoDB Atlas, cluster URL mongodb+srv://atlas-prod.mongodb.net, database prod_events, user svc_mongo

plant_message: Our Kubernetes cluster is in AWS us-east-1, cluster name prod-k8s-cluster, context name eks-prod-us-east-1

plant_message: The main ingress controller uses nginx, load balancer IP 52.14.201.88, TLS cert stored in secret tls-prod-cert in namespace ingress-nginx

plant_message: Terraform state is stored in S3 bucket tf-state-prod-clawbrain, region us-east-1, DynamoDB lock table tf-locks-prod

plant_message: The internal payments API is at https://payments.internal.svc:8443/v2, requires header X-Service-Token with value svc-token-payments-prod

update_message: Payments API moved to https://payments.internal.svc:9443/v3 after the security audit

plant_message: Notification service webhook endpoint is https://notify.prod.internal/hook/v1, secret key notify_wh_secret_2024 for HMAC validation

How to send to the notification service?

plant_message: Grafana dashboard for API latency is at https://grafana.internal/d/api-latency, uses Prometheus datasource prod-prometheus on port 9090
PagerDuty integration key for critical alerts is PD-KEY-CRIT-abc123xyz, routing key for infra team is PD-ROUTE-INFRA-456
recall_queries: How to send a critical alert?

plant_message: GitHub Actions uses self-hosted runner group prod-runners in us-east-1, runner labels: prod, x86_64, docker-enabled

How are our CI runners set up?

plant_message: Docker image registry is registry.prod.internal:5000, pull secret name prod-registry-secret, namespace kube-system
Vault cluster address is https://vault.prod.internal:8200, AppRole mount path auth/approle, role_id for backend services is backend-role-prod
recall_queries: How do services authenticate with Vault?

plant_message: Kafka cluster bootstrap servers are kafka-01.prod.internal:9092,kafka-02.prod.internal:9092,kafka-03.prod.internal:9092, SASL mechanism SCRAM-SHA-256
recall_queries: What are the Kafka bootstrap servers?

plant_message: VPN gateway for prod access is vpn.prod.internal, WireGuard port 51820, client config template at /etc/wireguard/prod.conf on the bastion
recall_queries: How do I connect to prod VPN?

plant_message: Shared NFS storage for logs is nfs.prod.internal:/exports/logs, mounted at /mnt/prod-logs on all app servers, retention 90 days
recall_queries: Where are the application logs stored?

plant_message: LDAP server for authentication is ldap://ldap.corp.internal:389, base DN dc=corp,dc=internal, service account cn=svc-ldap,ou=services,dc=corp,dc=internal
recall_queries: What is the LDAP base DN?

plant_message: RabbitMQ management UI is at https://rabbitmq.prod.internal:15672, vhost prod, admin user rmq_admin
App servers read config from etcd at http://etcd.prod.internal:2379, key prefix /config/prod/, service account svc-config-reader
recall_queries: Where does app config come from?

plant_message: CloudFront distribution ID E2QF9XLKP4MOCK for prod, origin is alb-prod.prod.internal, custom SSL cert ACM arn:aws:acm:us-east-1:123456789:certificate/abc-prod
recall_queries: What is our CDN distribution ID?
What origin does our CDN use?

plant_message: Read replicas for Postgres are at pg-replica-01.prod.internal:5432 and pg-replica-02.prod.internal:5432, PGBOUNCER pool at pgbouncer.prod.internal:5432
recall_queries: What are the Postgres read replicas?

plant_message: Jaeger tracing UI is at https://jaeger.prod.internal, collector endpoint http://jaeger-collector.prod.internal:14268/api/traces, sampling rate 0.01
recall_queries: What is the trace sampling rate?

plant_message: SMTP relay is smtp-relay.prod.internal port 587, STARTTLS required, sender domain prod.internal, service credentials svc-mailer / mailer_secret_2024
Daily DB backups go to S3 bucket db-backups-prod-clawbrain, retention 30 days, encrypted with KMS key alias/prod-backup-key, backup window 02:00–04:00 UTC
All Python services run on Python 3.12.3, managed via pyenv, project uses uv for dependency management, lockfile format uv.lock
recall_queries: What Python version do we use?
update_message: We upgraded Python to 3.13.1 after the security advisory in March

plant_message: Frontend stack is Next.js 15.2 with React 19, TypeScript 5.4, deployed via Vercel, preview URLs follow pattern pr-{NUMBER}.preview.clawbrain.io
recall_queries: What frontend framework do we use?

plant_message: AWS account ID for production is 123456789012, IAM role for CI/CD is arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/GithubActionsDeployRole
recall_queries: What is our AWS account ID?
What IAM role does CI use?

plant_message: Istio service mesh version 1.20, control plane namespace istio-system, mTLS mode STRICT, mesh CA cert rotates every 90 days
recall_queries: What service mesh do we use?

plant_message: Elasticsearch cluster is at https://es-prod.prod.internal:9200, index pattern logs-* for application logs, alias prod-events for event data
Feature flags are managed in LaunchDarkly SDK key prod-sdk-key-ld-abc123, environment Production, evaluation endpoint https://app.launchdarkly.com/sdk/latest-all
recall_queries: How do we manage feature flags?

plant_message: SSL certificates are managed by cert-manager v1.14 using Let's Encrypt ACME HTTP-01 challenge, issuer name letsencrypt-prod in namespace cert-manager
recall_queries: How do we manage SSL certs?

plant_message: Internal DNS is CoreDNS 1.11 running in kube-system, external DNS managed by Route53, hosted zone ID Z1A2B3C4D5E6F7 for prod.internal
recall_queries: What DNS server do we use internally?

plant_message: HPA on the API deployment: minReplicas 3, maxReplicas 20, target CPU 65%, custom metric requests-per-second threshold 500
The nightly data export job runs at 01:30 UTC via Kubernetes CronJob export-job in namespace batch, outputs to S3 bucket data-exports-prod
recall_queries: When does the data export run?
What time is the nightly export?

plant_message: Database migrations use Alembic, migration scripts in db/migrations/, run as part of the Helm chart post-upgrade hook, rollback via alembic downgrade -1
Structured logs use JSON format, shipped to Elasticsearch via Filebeat, log level controlled by LOG_LEVEL env var, default INFO in prod
recall_queries: What log format do we use?

plant_message: End-to-end tests run against staging environment https://staging.clawbrain.io, using Playwright 1.44 with test user account e2e-user@clawbrain.io
recall_queries: What account do E2E tests use?

plant_message: Internal service ports: API gateway 8080, gRPC 50051, metrics 9090, health check 8081, admin 9000. External: HTTPS 443, HTTP 80 (redirects to 443)
recall_queries: What port does the API gateway run on?

plant_message: Primary region us-east-1, DR region us-west-2. Failover is manual, RTO 4 hours, RPO 1 hour. DR drill scheduled every quarter
GDPR data residency requirement: all EU user PII must stay in eu-central-1. Separate RDS cluster rds-eu.prod.internal for EU data, encrypted with KMS key alias/eu-data-key
recall_queries: Where is EU user data stored?
